raw_text:
The user is asking me to analyze the structure of a local table file called "tables/results.csv" and describe the meaning of each column. They explicitly mention this is a local table file, so I must use the table_analyzer tool before answering.

I need to call table_analyzer with the path "tables/results.csv". The user wants column structure analysis, so I should set describe to true to get numeric statistics by column, and I can set max_rows_preview to get a preview of the data.

Let me make the tool call.
</think>

<tool_call>
<function=table_analyzer>
<parameter=path>
tables/results.csv
</parameter>
<parameter=describe>
True
</parameter>
<parameter=max_rows_preview>
10
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
